title: Dutch Chicken Satay
description: A flavorful and spicy Dutch-inspired chicken skewer recipe, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut milk, soy sauce, ginger, coriander powder, cumin powder, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Thread the marinated chicken onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with roasted peanuts or cashews.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as steamed vegetables or a salad.
